title: The Worst Generation Faces the Emperors
description: On pages 26–29, this part focuses on Unknown person #25, Unknown person #26, Kaido, Unknown person #27, Unknown person #28, King as The Worst Generation confronts Kaido and Big Mom on Onigashima.
scene: On the rooftop of Onigashima, the Worst Generation challenges Kaido and Big Mom directly, turning the raid into a clash against emperors.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But if you don't mind, give your daughter a message for me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just tell her a fine gentleman gave you a little hand.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: So in the end...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: didn't do anything at all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: What are you talking about, Dad?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've nothing but gratitude to that gentleman, of course...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But you were the one who went through so much just to find the fish and bring it here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Thanks, Dad.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: I'm really happy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All right, you guys! We're puttin' on a feast of our own!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He shared a bunch of dragon salmon with us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: First up...

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: Suculent seared dragon salmon sushi!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ... so we're havin' a special full- course dinner tonight!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Wahoo! yummy yum yum!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Whoa. This scent!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Aah, it's just too much!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: face harped m joy nd it n't go back!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, wow! Look at the fatty salmon. It's so tender it jiggles!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Time to dig in!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Glimt

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Glimt

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Chew Chew

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: MM! The fish is so tender it melted into sweet waves the moment it touched my tongue!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the aroma the searing gave it is making me dizzy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then there's the roughly chopped, scallions with their contrasting crunchy texture and tangy bitterness.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Sooo Luxur- IANT!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They pair perfectly with the sharp bite of the wasabi, beautifully underscoring the richness of the fish's fatty oils!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: DELI- CLOUS!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: MAYBE, JUST MAYBE...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I met a cook who'll one day be a legend...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: I mean, look at every one.

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: One bite of his dragon salmon...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...has turned this entire 'Banquet into heaven on earth!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: RUMORS say that somewhere on the GRAND line is a mermaid's paradise...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: ...And I {bet it's something like this!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Rooftop Battle storyline through 36 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
